title: 2026-03-24 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 49.56
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-03-24: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 49.56/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-03-24, the score printed 49.56/100 in the elevated regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
